hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'cargo\s+(build|test|check|clippy)' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'grep|head|tail'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Filter cargo output. Append: 2>&1 | grep -v objfs | grep -E '"'"'^(error|warning:.*fmpl|Compiling fmpl|test |test result:)'"'"' | head -30' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qF '.cargo/registry'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use context7 (resolve-library-id + query-docs) for external crate APIs, not ~/.cargo/registry' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'cargo\s+doc.*--open'; then echo 'BLOCKED: cargo doc --open has no effect headless. Use context7 or fetch docs.rs' >&2; exit 2; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rustc\s.*/tmp/'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Do not compile standalone temp files with rustc. Add a test to the workspace or check docs' >&2; exit 2; fi

INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qF '.cargo/registry'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Use context7 (resolve-library-id + query-docs) for external crate APIs, not ~/.cargo/registry' >&2; exit 2; fi
